title: Material price escalation

title: Permit approval delays

title: Tower crane delivery
description: Long-lead crane shipment delayed from manufacturer

description: Shoring instability during bulk excavation — localized rework

title: Underground utility strike
description: Unmapped utility hit during utility relocation or shoring

title: Material delivery slippage
description: Rebar and curtain-wall lead-time delay — long-lead procurement

title: Safety incident / stand-down
description: OSHA stop-work event triggers inspection and crew re-training

title: Late design changes
description: RFI-driven rework during design coordination and early construction

title: Inspection delays
description: Regulator sign-off slower than scheduled — permit and occupancy-cert risk

title: Differential settlement
description: Mat foundation settles non-uniformly — monitoring and corrective works
